title: 🔥存量博弈下的吸血效应
body: 市场处于结构性避险阶段。BTC.D 报 58.5%，7日上涨 0.7%。在 BTC 价格下跌 12.1% 之际，市值占比不降反升，显示资金正从山寨币流出并向 BTC 汇聚避险，存量博弈特征明显。场内流动性收缩导致二八分化加剧。中性。山寨币流动性枯竭何时见底？
title_en: 🔥 The Vampire Effect in a Zero-Sum Game
body_en: The market is in a structural risk-off phase. BTC.D sits at 58.5%, up 0.7% in 7 days. Despite BTC dumping 12.1%, dominance actually rose—signaling capital flight from alts into BTC for safety. It’s a classic zero-sum game. Shrinking liquidity is intensifying the 80/20 split. Neutral. When will the altcoin liquidity drought finally bottom out?
